logId.description: Log identity — the hex SHA-256 of the log's public key. Names *which* log; the caller maps it to a pinned key. Non-load-bearing for the Merkle math.

index.description: Zero-based leaf index of this entry within the tree of `inclusionProof.treeSize`.

integratedTime.description: Unix seconds at which the log integrated the entry. Carried, not verified here.

canonicalBody.description: The exact bytes that were logged as this leaf, base64. The leaf hash is `SHA-256(0x00 || canonicalBody)` (RFC 6962 leaf hashing).

inclusionProof.description: RFC 6962 audit path proving `canonicalBody` is the leaf at `index`.

checkpoint.description: The log's signed tree head as a c2sp.org/tlog-checkpoint signed note: `origin`, `treeSize`, and base64 root on their own lines, followed by a blank line and one or more `— <name> <base64>` signature lines. The verify lib checks the signature against the pinned log key before trusting the root.

TransparencyLogEntry.description: A Sigstore/Rekor-compatible transparency-log entry (docs/SPEC.md §4.3). Proves the logged `canonicalBody` sits at leaf `index` of a log whose signed tree head is `checkpoint`.

treeSize.description: Number of leaves in the tree this proof leads to the root of.

rootHash.description: The Merkle tree root at `treeSize`, lowercase hex. Advisory: the verify lib checks the recomputed root against the **signed checkpoint** root, and requires this field to agree with it (a self-consistent entry).

hashes.description: Sibling node hashes of the audit path, leaf-to-root, each a lowercase-hex SHA-256 digest. The array length is fixed by `index` and `treeSize` (RFC 6962); the verify lib enforces the hex/length of each element.

LogInclusionProof.description: An RFC 6962 inclusion proof: the Merkle audit path from a leaf up to the tree root at `treeSize`. `hashes` are the sibling node hashes, ordered leaf-to-root; the verify lib recomputes the root from the leaf and this path and compares it to the root the signed  {@link  TransparencyLogEntry.checkpoint }  commits to.
